title: METEO
summary: Real-time weather app built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, and shadcn/ui for current conditions, 7-day forecasts, and map-based insights.
overview: METEO is a weather experience focused on speed and clarity. It combines live weather conditions, multi-day forecasting, and an interactive weather map into a single interface so users can quickly understand local conditions and upcoming changes.
highlights: Current weather conditions with quick visual context.
Interactive map with weather-related data layers.
